guardrails.note: This workflow does not claim indexing, ranking, impressions, clicks, or income. It uses local SEO structure and Search Console operating rules.

gscDailyActions.operatingRule: Submit sitemap.xml first in GSC. Then use URL Inspection for 5-15 URLs from todayBatch. Do not request indexing for hundreds of URLs in one day.

contentDailyActions.rule: Prioritize concrete searched problems: exact error, quick fix, detailed steps, command/code, risks, related q pages, and one deep blog link.

problemLanes.publishingRule: Write exact error, cause, fix steps, rollback, and a safe verification checklist.
problemLanes.reason: Codex setup and error searches are concrete, urgent, and easier to rank than broad AI tool posts.
